# Vendored MNN 3.6.0

This directory contains the minimal Windows x64 dynamic-library files copied from the official `alibaba/MNN` 3.6.0 release package:

`mnn_3.6.0_windows_x64_cpu_opencl_vulkan_avx512.zip`

Source URL:

`https://github.com/alibaba/MNN/releases/download/3.6.0/mnn_3.6.0_windows_x64_cpu_opencl_vulkan_avx512.zip`

Included files:

- `windows-x64/include/`
- `windows-x64/lib/MNN.lib`
- `windows-x64/bin/MNN.dll`

Excluded files:

- static `MNN.lib` files
- `.pdb` debug symbol files
- the original full release zip

The original package checksum is recorded in `SHA256SUMS.txt`. MNN is distributed under Apache-2.0; see `LICENSE.txt`.
